textByHash.31767b0f28120934b4af9b459f9d43432bda754f: Hello there; are you interested in any of my fine daggers? Ideal for slipping under desert robes to give your enemies a nasty surprise...
textByHash.8079ce5738b94f5cfa2a86e50526940f310f9ce1: I think it will take months for me to return to normal business. If you can wait that long, however, I may have tasks for you.
